code:
import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let target = match io.read_line()
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      if tok == target
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
end
